data [required]

[object]

The list of segments.

attributes [required]

object

Attributes of a segment in a response.

date-time

The creation timestamp in RFC 3339 format.

created_by [required]

object

A user who performed an action on a segment.

string

The email handle of the user.

icon [required]

string

The URL of the user icon.

id [required]

string

The numeric identifier of the user.

name [required]

string

The display name of the user.

uuid [required]

string

The unique identifier of the user.

data_query [required]

object

Query definition for the segment. Contains one or more query blocks and an optional combination formula.

combination

string

Boolean expression combining multiple query blocks.

event_platforms

[object]

List of event platform query blocks.

facet [required]

string

The facet to extract user identifiers from.

from

int64

The start of the time range in milliseconds since epoch.

string

The name of this query block.

query [required]

string

The search query for filtering events.

to

int64

The end of the time range in milliseconds since epoch.

The type of conversion to track.

string

string

request.html:
data [required]

object

Data object for a static segment creation request.

attributes [required]

object

Attributes for creating a new static segment.

description [required]

string

A description of the static segment.

journey_query_object [required]

object

The journey query object used to compute the static segment user list.

nodes [required]

[object]

The list of journey nodes defining the query.

filters [required]

[object]

The list of filters for this node.

attribute [required]

string

The attribute to filter on.

value [required]

string

The value to match.

name [required]

string

The name of the static segment.

tags

[string]

A list of tags for the static segment.

type [required]

enum

Type of the static segment creation request resource. Allowed enum values: create_static_segment_request

attributes.description: Users who visited at least N times.
attributes.name: stickiness-v1

data [required]

[object]

The list of segment templates.

object

Attributes of a segment template in a response.

category [required]

string

The category of the template.

created_at [required]

The creation timestamp in RFC 3339 format.

description [required]

string

A description of the template.

modified_at [required]

date-time

The last modification timestamp in RFC 3339 format.

name [required]

string

parameters [required]

object

The template parameter definitions.

<any-key>

object

A parameter definition for a segment template.

default [required]

string

The default value for the parameter.

description [required]

string

A description of the parameter.

validate [required]

string

Validation rules for the parameter.

status [required]

enum

The status of a segment template. Allowed enum values: active,deprecated,archived

version [required]

int64

The version number of the template.

id [required]

string

The unique identifier of the template.

type [required]

enum

Type of the segment template resource. Allowed enum values: template_metadata

400.html:
errors [required]

[object]

detail

string

A human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the error.

meta

object

Non-standard meta-information about the error

source

object

References to the source of the error.

header

string

A string indicating the name of a single request header which caused the error.

parameter

string

A string indicating which URI query parameter caused the error.

pointer

string

A JSON pointer to the value in the request document that caused the error.

status

string

Status code of the response.

title

string

Short human-readable summary of the error.

request.html:
data [required]

object

Data object for a segment update request.

object

Attributes for updating a segment. All fields are optional.

data_query

object

Query definition for the segment. Contains one or more query blocks and an optional combination formula.

combination

string

Boolean expression combining multiple query blocks.

event_platforms

[object]

List of event platform query blocks.

facet [required]

string

The facet to extract user identifiers from.

from

int64

The start of the time range in milliseconds since epoch.

name [required]

string

The name of this query block.

query [required]

string

The search query for filtering events.

to

int64

The end of the time range in milliseconds since epoch.

journeys

[object]

List of journey-based query blocks.

conversion_type

string

The type of conversion to track.

group_by

string

The facet to group journey results by.

name

string

The name of this journey query block.

search

string

The search query for filtering events.
